items.title: Kuss takes Giro stage as Vingegaard closes in on title
items.summary: American Sepp Kuss gains the first Giro d'Italia stage win of his career as team-mate Jonas Vingegaard moves closer to overall general classification victory.

items.title: French Open to take action against Vallejo for 'sexist' remarks
items.summary: Adolfo Daniel Vallejo is criticised for saying his French Open second-round match should not have been umpired by a woman.

items.title: Fruk: Rijeka živi od transfera i treba ići dalje. Želim se okušati u velikim ligama
items.summary: TONI FRUK potvrdio je da se radi na njegovom transferu.

items.title: VIDEO Repka je na okupu! Luka Modrić kao Zorro, stigli i dečki iz Cityja. Evo treninga iz Rijeke
items.summary: RIJEKA - Svi su na broju! U petak u 18 sati je na pomoćni teren Rujevice istrčala kompletna hrvatska reprezentacija, uz izuzetak Erlića koji je na svadbi. items.title: How Ferguson twice moved to sign Rooney from Everton
items.summary: Everton boss David Moyes reveals on the latest episode of the Wayne Rooney Show the inside story on Wayne Rooney's move to Manchester United - with Sir Alex Ferguson twice making moves to sign the then teenage striker.

items.title: Pandur: Englezi misle da neće biti preteško protiv Hrvatske. Vidjet će da hoće

items.title: Wonderkid Sooryavanshi recovers from head blow to hit 96
items.summary: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi once again stars in the Indian Premier League with a brilliant 96 off 47 balls in the second qualifier.

items.title: Ireland not at NZ's 'level' in one-off Test loss
items.summary: Ireland captain Andy Balbirnie says that his side "weren't at the levels New Zealand were at" as the tourists completed a straightforward victory in their one-off Test against Ireland, wrapping up the win on day three by an innings and 79 runs.
